description_long: This skateboard features a sleek, elongated deck with a dark surface adorned by a bold orange arrow graphic and segmented accents, giving it a dynamic, modern look. The deck is slightly concave with upturned nose and tail, designed for tricks and maneuverability. Four green wheels are attached to metal trucks beneath the deck, providing stability and smooth rolling on urban surfaces. The underside of the deck mirrors the top's graphic, maintaining a cohesive visual style. The grip tape on the top appears solid and dark, ensuring traction for the rider. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood, metal, and polyurethane, typical for high-quality skateboards.
description: A modern skateboard with a dark deck, orange arrow graphic, green wheels, and solid grip tape, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, the orange arrow graphic, and a glimpse of the green wheels beneath.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the deck, the upturned nose and tail, and all four green wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail end of the skateboard, the continuation of the orange graphic, and the wheels partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with the same deck shape, graphic, and wheel arrangement.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a bold orange arrow graphic with segmented rectangular accents, curving from the tail toward the nose, set against a dark background for a striking, modern appearance.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and rounded, solid green, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver trucks, low profile, top-mounted, with no visible branding or unique features.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with no visible patterns, graphics, or text.
